texts.orig: All contract rates are net and non commissionable. All rates are confidential and can not be published. Rates are per person per night sharing double room. VAT is included in all rates.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: DIAMONDS LEISURE BEACH & GOLF RESORT. Travelife Gold Certified Property.
texts.text: DIAMONDS LEISURE BEACH & GOLF RESORT. Travelife Gold Certified Property.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Welcome drink. In room mini fridge stocked with water, soft drinks and local beer, coffee and tea making facilities. Breakfast, lunch and dinner served at the Diani Restaurant, with Sunday brunch served weekly at the Bustani restaurant. Dine around for clients with a minimum stay of 5 nights: 3 free dinners of their choice at the Coral Beach Restaurant, Bustani Steakhouse, Frangipane Pizzeria, The Golf Pub Restaurant. Additional meals at a charge. Soft drinks, water, coffee, tea, local beer, selected wine by the glass, selected spirits and cocktails from 10:00 to 24:00 at the bars. Bahari bar serves drinks from 10:00 to 24:00. Coral Beach bar serves drinks from 10:00 to 15:00. Maweni pool Bar serves drinks from 10:00 to 18:00. Baobab swim up pool Bar serves drinks from 10:00 to 18:00. Lobby Coffee shop serves drinks from 10:00 to 23:00 with afternoon tea served from 16:00 to 17:00. Wifi Internet in all rooms and public areas. Fitness and gymnastic activities, table tennis, billiard, beach volley, non-motorized water sports including SUP and kayaks. Evening animation and evening entertainment program with local shows. Simba Kids and Junior Club. Sun umbrellas, sun loungers complimentary towels by the pool and on the beach. School Holidays, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Easter, Christmas & New Year lunch - special dinner programs.
texts.text: Welcome drink. In room mini fridge stocked with water, soft drinks and local beer, coffee and tea making facilities. Breakfast, lunch and dinner served at the Diani Restaurant, with Sunday brunch served weekly at the Bustani restaurant. Dine around for clients with a minimum stay of 5 nights: 3 free dinners of their choice at the Coral Beach Restaurant, Bustani Steakhouse, Frangipane Pizzeria, The Golf Pub Restaurant. Additional meals at a charge. Soft drinks, water, coffee, tea, local beer, selected wine by the glass, selected spirits and cocktails from 10:00 to 24:00 at the bars. Bahari bar serves drinks from 10:00 to 24:00. Coral Beach bar serves drinks from 10:00 to 15:00. Maweni pool Bar serves drinks from 10:00 to 18:00. Baobab swim up pool Bar serves drinks from 10:00 to 18:00. Lobby Coffee shop serves drinks from 10:00 to 23:00 with afternoon tea served from 16:00 to 17:00. Wifi Internet in all rooms and public areas. Fitness and gymnastic activities, table tennis, billiard, beach volley, non-motorized water sports including SUP and kayaks. Evening animation and evening entertainment program with local shows. Simba Kids and Junior Club. Sun umbrellas, sun loungers complimentary towels by the pool and on the beach. School Holidays, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Easter, Christmas & New Year lunch - special dinner programs.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Express check in. Late check out subject to availability. Welcome Prosecco and canapes on arrival. 1hr massage per person once per stay. 18 holes of Golf daily with all green fees covered by the hotel at Diamonds Leisure Golf Club. Full room service included at no extra charge for all meal options. Pillow menu, bathrobes and slippers. Premium selection of branded spirits, beer and wine. A'la carte dining experience once per stay at Onda Restaurant. Reserved sunbeds in beach club area with drinks service
texts.text: Express check in. Late check out subject to availability. Welcome Prosecco and canapes on arrival. 1hr massage per person once per stay. 18 holes of Golf daily with all green fees covered by the hotel at Diamonds Leisure Golf Club. Full room service included at no extra charge for all meal options. Pillow menu, bathrobes and slippers. Premium selection of branded spirits, beer and wine. A'la carte dining experience once per stay at Onda Restaurant. Reserved sunbeds in beach club area with drinks service

table_cells.text: Premium All Inclusive is bookable only for adults (above 18 years). The supplement needs to be booked for all adults sharing the room and for the full stay.
The supplement is not subject to any special offer or early booking discount. Minumum nights required: 4
